briefdescription.para: This function validates boot header.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XSecure_ImageInfo structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on successful verification.
Error code on failure.

listitem.para: If PUF helper data exists in boot header
Copy PPK to global variable for future use

briefdescription.para: This function decrypts the image partition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XSecure_ImageInfo structure
Pointer to single partition non-bitstream image
Pointer to User Key
Location of the secure image loaded after validation

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on successful verification.
Error code on failure.

listitem.para: Linux or U-boot stores Key in the form of String So this conversion is required here.
XilSecure expects Key in big endian form
Initialize the AES driver so that it's ready to use

briefdescription.para: This function performs authentication of a given data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to auhentication parameter structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
XST_FAILURE on failure

listitem.para: Calculate Hash on Data to be authenticated

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the DMA driver.

simplesect.para: returns the error code on any error returns XST_SUCCESS on success

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize CsuDma and return CsuDma pointer.

simplesect.para: returns reference to a XCsuDma driver instance

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcSize, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3Hash

briefdescription.para: This function access the xilsecure SHA3 hardware based on the flags provided to calculate the SHA3 hash.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit of the input or output address.
Lower 32-bit of the input or output address.
Size of the data on which hash should be calculated.

inputs for the operation requested BIT(0) - for initializing csudma driver and SHA3, (Here address and size inputs can be NULL) BIT(1) - To call Sha3_Update API which can be called multiple times when data is not contiguous. BIT(2) - to get final hash of the whole updated data. Hash will be overwritten at provided address with 48 bytes.

simplesect.para: Returns Status XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcSize, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaCore

briefdescription.para: This is the function to RSA decrypt or encrypt the provided data and load back to memory.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit Linear memory space from where CSUDMA will read the data
Lower 32-bit Linear memory space from where CSUDMA will read the data
Number of bytes to be encrypted or decrypted.
Flags for operation, where BIT(0) indicates Encryption/Decryption (0 for RSA Private key Decryption or 1 for RSA Public key Encryption)

simplesect.para: Returns Status XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure.

Data to be encrypted/Decrypted + Modulus + Exponent Modulus and Data should always be key size Exponent : private key's exponent is key size while decrypting the signature and 32 bit for public key for encrypting the signature In this API we are not taking exponentiation value.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the AES-GCM engine with Key and Iv.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

listitem.para: Initialize the Aes driver so that it's ready to use

briefdescription.para: This function performs the AES decryption of the data-blob.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function performs the AES encryption of the data-blob.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function checks for flags field of the XSecure_AesParams struct and resolves weather the request is encryption or decryption.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesParams structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function performs authentication of data by encrypting the signature with provided key and compares with hash of the data and returns success or failure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the RSA signature of the data
Pointer to XSecure_RsaKey structure.
Pointer to the hash of the data to be authenticated.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

listitem.para: Compare encrypted signature with sha3 hash calculated on data

briefdescription.para: This function performs authentication of a partition of an image.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the CSU DMA instance.
Pointer to partition to be authenticated.
Represents the size of the partition.
Pointer to authentication certificate of the partition.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function performs authentication of a boot header of the image.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the CSU DMA instance.
pointer to boot header of the image.
Size of the boot header.
Pointer to authentication certificate.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
XST_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function copies the data from specified source to destination using CSU DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the destination address.
Pointer to the source address.
Data size to be copied.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
XST_FAILURE on failure

listitem.para: Data transfer in loop back mode
Polling for transfer to be done
To acknowledge the transfer has completed

briefdescription.para: This function verifies SPK by authenticating SPK with PPK, also checks either SPK is revoked or not.if it is not boot header authentication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the authentication certificate.
Input variable which holds efuse RSA authentication or boot header authentication (0 for Boot header authentication or 1 for RSA authentication)

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

listitem.para: Check the cache value with the value passed
Verify SPK with PPK in authentication certificate

briefdescription.para: This function authenticates the single partition image's boot header and image header, also copies all the required details to the ImageInfo pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the single partition image.
Pointer to XSecure_ImageInfo structure.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

listitem.para: XSECURE_AUTH_NOT_ENABLED - represents image is not authenticated.

simplesect.para: Copies the header and authentication certificate to internal buffer.

listitem.para: Copy boot header to internal buffer
Copy Image header authentication certificate to local memory
Copy image header to internal memory
Partition header offset is w.r.t to image start address
Add partition header IV to boot header IV

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 AddrHigh, u32 AddrLow, u32 KupAddrHigh, u32 KupAddrLow, XSecure_DataAddr *Addr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SecureImage

briefdescription.para: This function process the secure image of single partition created by bootgen.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit linear memory space of single partition non-bitstream image.
Lower 32-bit linear memory space of single partition non-bitstream image.
Higher 32-bit linear memory space of KUP key.
lower 32-bit linear memory space of KUP key.
Location of the secure image loaded after validation.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

listitem.para: Error other than XSECURE_AUTH_NOT_ENABLED error will be an error
Here Buffer still contains Boot header
If authentication is enabled and authentication of partition is enabled
Copy authentication certificate to internal memory
Decrypt the partition if encryption is enabled
Add partition header IV to boot header IV

briefdescription.para: This function tells whether RSA authentication is enabled or not.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XSECURE_ENABLED if RSA bit of efuse is programmed
XSECURE_NOTENABLED if RSA bit of efuse is not programmed.

briefdescription.para: This function tells whether encrypt only is enabled or not.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XSECURE_ENABLED if enc_only bit of efuse is programmed
XSECURE_NOTENABLED if enc_only bit of efuse is not programmed

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the PPK hash with PPK programmed on efuse.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to CSU DMA instance.
Pointer to authentication certificate.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on successful verification.
Error code on failure.

listitem.para: Check if PPK selection is correct

briefdescription.para: This function authenticates SPK with provided PPK or PPK from authentication certificate.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to CSU DMA instance.
Pointer to authentication certificate.
Pointer to the PPK key, or NULL to use PPK from provided * authentication certificate.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on successful verification.
Error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether SPK is been revoked or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to authentication certificate.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on successful verification.
Error code on failure.

listitem.para: If SPKID Efuse is selected , Verifies SPKID with Efuse SPKID

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the interface functions for secure library.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- --- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.0 DP 02/15/17 Initial release 2.2 vns 09/18/17 Added APIs to support generic functionality for SHA3 and RSA hardware at linux level. Removed RSA-SHA2 authentication support for loading linux image and dtb from u-boot, as here it is using SHA2 hash and single RSA key pair authentication 3.0 vns 02/21/18 Added support for single partition image authentication and/or decryption. 3.1 vns 04/13/18 Added device key support even if authentication is not been enabled for single partition image, when PMUFW is compiled by enabling secure environment variable in bsp settings. ka 04/10/18 Added support for user-efuse revocation ka 04/18/18 Added support for Zeroization of the memory in case of Gcm-Tag mismatch 3.2 ka 04/04/18 Added support for Sha3_Update, if the payload is not 4 bytes aligned. ka 08/03/18 Added XSecure_Aes Api's to encrypt or decrypt data-blobs. ka 10/25/18 Added support to clear user key after use. 4.0 arc 18/12/18 Fixed MISRA-C violations. arc 12/02/19 Added support for validate image format. rama 18/03/19 Fixed IAR compiler errors and warnings arc 03/20/19 Reading the return value of the functions to validate 4.0 Nava 19/03/19 In the current implementation, the SecureIv variable is sharing between xilfpga and Xilsecure libraries. To avoid data sharing conflicts removed SecureIV shared variable dependency. mmd 03/15/19 Refactored the code psl 03/26/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation 4.1 psl 07/02/19 Fixed Coverity warning. mmd 07/05/19 Optimized the code psl 07/31/19 Fixed MISRA-C violations. 4.2 kal 03/12/20 Authenticate SizeofImgHdr before use, in case of failure return XSECURE_IMAGE_HEADER_SIZE_ERR. Added support to hold Aes engine in reset after secure image processing. vns 03/24/20 Cleared locally copied user key Corrected IV calculation ana 04/03/20 Removed the support of storing key in global array rpo 04/09/20 Aligned the buffers used by DMA to 64 bytes kpt 04/10/20 Resolved coverity warnings ana 04/24/20 Removed support of boot header RSA with 0x1 and 0x2 4.6 am 09/17/21 Resolved compiler warnings 4.7 am 11/26/21 Resolved doxygen warnings har 01/03/22 Updated Status as XSECURE_SHA3_INIT_FAIL in case of failure in XSecure_Sha3Initialize() 5.2 ng 07/05/23 add SDT support 5.7 tus 04/19/26 Fixed SW-BP-RETURN violation
